result.summary: The page is mostly functional-looking, but contains a notable spelling error in the main navigation, several game tiles that are awkwardly clipped at the right edge of the viewport, and a bottom row of games cut off by the sticky footer navigation.

issues.description: The navigation tab labeled 'Jacpots' is misspelled — it should read 'Jackpots'. This is prominent in the top category navigation.

Game tiles in the third column ('Magni... Pho...', 'Mun... Mil...', 'Hyperc...', 'Dar... Water') are hard-clipped at the right edge of the viewport with no visible scroll affordance, making titles unreadable.
issues.suggestion: If these rows are horizontal carousels, add a visible scroll indicator, partial-peek styling, or navigation arrows; otherwise adjust the grid to fit whole tiles within the viewport.

issues.description: The 'Hot Gam...' tab in the category navigation is truncated at the right edge without a clear indication that the list scrolls horizontally.
issues.suggestion: Ensure the tab bar shows a scroll hint (fade gradient or arrow) or reduce tab widths so labels are fully visible.

issues.description: The bottom row of 'Top Played New Games' (e.g., 'Who Wants to Be a Millionaire', 'Rakin Bacon') is partially obscured/cut off by the sticky bottom navigation bar.
issues.suggestion: Add sufficient bottom padding to the scrollable content area so tiles are not hidden behind the fixed bottom nav.

issues.description: Section heading 'Jacpots' icon badge inside the tab also reads 'JACKPOT' while the tab says 'Jacpots', creating inconsistent labeling.
issues.suggestion: Standardize the spelling across the icon and label after fixing the typo.
